name: QuickBooks
description: Cloud accounting platform (QuickBooks Online) offering accounting, invoices, payments, and related financial APIs for integrating apps with QuickBooks company data.

auth_methods.note: Official Intuit docs state QuickBooks Online uses OAuth 2.0 and describes the authorization code flow and token use (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>).

credential_access.note: Developer documentation shows you can create an app in the Developer Dashboard to obtain Client ID and Client Secret and use sandbox credentials for development without manual approval.

api_surface.note: Documentation hub and API reference indicate REST-based Accounting, Payments, Reports APIs covering most product objects; API Explorer and Postman collections are provided.

buildability.note: Developers can self-register, obtain sandbox keys, and call REST APIs using OAuth2 for development. Production access requires app review but sandbox allows building and testing today.

queries: How to create an app QuickBooks Developer Dashboard Client ID Client Secret
QuickBooks move an app to production app review
QuickBooks API reference REST Accounting API
